publishedAbstract: - The flags shown by the `noobaa account create--help` command do not match the parameters listed in the official [OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) documentation](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.18/html/deploying_and_managing_openshift_data_foundation_using_red_hat_openstack_platform/multicloud-object-gateway_osp#creating-a-user-in-the-multicloud-object-gateway_osp).
publishedTitle: Discrepancy in NooBaa Account Creation Flags Across ODF Versions
